_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Service support involves fixing service faults and maintaining the underlying infrastructure, ensuring processes are in place to keep the service running efficiently.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.455), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.444).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [service]. DDaT-only terms [efficiently, ensuring, faults, fixing, infrastructure, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.874, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Service support involves fixing service faults and maintaining the underlying in" and "Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.582 ≈ STS 0.540 (gap 0.042). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [service]. DDaT-only: [efficiently, ensuring, faults, fixing, infrastructure, involves]. WIDAI-only: [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement].

signals.detail: STS 0.540 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
